name: Database Designer
description: Professional database design, analysis, and optimization tool. Generates Mermaid ERD diagrams from SQL/JSON schemas, recommends covering indexes for query patterns, and creates zero-downtime migration scripts with validation.
review: Production-ready database design tool with comprehensive functionality. Three fully-verified tools: schema analyzer, index optimizer, and migration generator. Zero external dependencies (Python stdlib only). Excellent documentation and type-safe implementation.
